events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario. Scenario: Progress photos for Spool erection & fit-up show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference ASME B31.3, iso drawings. Stage rough-complete. No component condition categories flagged. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since checkpoint scope finished, remaining cleanup/finish outside checkpoint. No defects described. So decision pass, risk low, work_stage rough-complete, percent_complete maybe 100? But overall progress maybe 100 for checkpoint. component_conditions empty. value 0. confidence high. findings empty. actions maybe none or continue with closeout. references ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Need include all fields. Ensure valid JSON.
